items.title: Radius Insights Appoints Former P&G Executive Michael Lancor to its Board of Directors
items.description: Radius Insights, a leading global market research and insights firm, has appointed Michael Lancor, former Vice President of Analytics and Insights at Procter & Gamble, to its Board of Directors.

items.title: 3 Smart Defensive Stocks for an Uneasy Market
items.description: Recession risks persist despite record market highs. Here are three defensive stocks—including PG, JNJ, and the DIA ETF—that can help protect your portfolio

items.title: How to use the tax-loss selling occurring now to pick up quality stocks on the cheap
items.description: Kevin Simpson on how to use this annual phenomenon to your advantage.

items.title: KXI: Consumer Staples Dashboard For November
3 Safe-and-Steady Stocks to Consider Right Now
items.description: Stocks with low volatility can be a great foundation for a portfolio, especially for investors looking to reduce risk. While they don’t often make headlines, these companies provide consistency in an unpredictable market.
